/* eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars, @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any, react/no-unescaped-entities */ import React from "react"; // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars import { Plus, Wallet, Search, Calendar, Tag, Trash2, ArrowDownCircle } from "lucide-react"; import { redirect } from "next/navigation"; import { auth } from "@/lib/auth"; import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow, } from "@/components/ui/table"; import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"; import Link from "next/link"; interface DepensesPageProps { params: Promise<{ id: string }>; } export default async function DepensesPage({ params }: DepensesPageProps) { const { id: boutiqueId } = await params; const session = await auth(); if (!session?.user) redirect("/login"); const depenses = await prisma.depense.findMany({ where: { boutiqueId }, orderBy: { date: "desc" }, }); const totalDepenses = depenses.reduce((acc, curr) => acc + curr.montant, 0); return (

Dépenses

Suivez vos coûts opérationnels et charges fixes.

Total des dépenses

{totalDepenses.toLocaleString()} FCFA

Conseil de gestion

Catégorisez bien vos dépenses pour identifier vos plus gros postes de coûts.
Dépense Catégorie Date Montant Actions {depenses.length > 0 ? ( depenses.map((depense) => (

{depense.libelle}

 {depense.categorie}
{new Date(depense.date).toLocaleDateString()}
-{depense.montant.toLocaleString()} FCFA )) ) : (

Aucune dépense enregistrée

 )}
); }

/* eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars, @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any, react/no-unescaped-entities */ import React from "react"; import { redirect, notFound } from "next/navigation"; import { Package, ShoppingCart, TrendingUp, Plus, AlertTriangle, Wallet, // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars ArrowUpCircle, Users, BarChart3, ArrowRight, Target, Zap, TrendingDown, Calendar, Layers, History } from "lucide-react"; import { auth } from "@/lib/auth"; import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"; import Link from "next/link"; interface BoutiquePageProps { params: Promise<{ id: string }>; } export default async function BoutiqueDashboardPage({ params }: BoutiquePageProps) { const { id } = await params; const session = await auth(); if (!session?.user) redirect("/login"); const boutique = await prisma.boutique.findUnique({ where: { id }, include: { _count: { select: { produits: true, commandesClient: true, depenses: true, clients: true, }, }, produits: { where: { quantite: { lte: 5 } }, take: 5, }, commandesClient: { take: 6, orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }, include: { client: true, lignes: true } }, depenses: { take: 3, orderBy: { date: "desc" } } }, }); if (!boutique) notFound(); const totalVentes = boutique.commandesClient.reduce((acc, cmd) => acc + cmd.total, 0); const totalDepenses = boutique.depenses.reduce((acc, dep) => acc + dep.montant, 0); const benefice = totalVentes - totalDepenses; const stats = [ { label: "Produits", value: boutique._count.produits, icon: Package, color: "text-blue-500", bg: "bg-blue-500/10", trend: "Stock" }, { label: "Ventes", value: boutique._count.commandesClient, icon: ShoppingCart, color: "text-emerald-500", bg: "bg-emerald-500/10", trend: "Mois" }, { label: "Clients", value: boutique._count.clients, icon: Users, color: "text-violet-500", bg: "bg-violet-500/10", trend: "Total" }, { label: "Dépenses", value: boutique._count.depenses, icon: Wallet, color: "text-rose-500", bg: "bg-rose-500/10", trend: "Frais" }, ]; return (
{/* Header Premium & Dynamic Hero */}
Dashboard V2 • Premium

{boutique.nom}

{new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long' })}
Objectif 85% atteint
{/* Main Stats Bento Grid */}
// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars {stats.map((stat, i) => (
{stat.value}

{stat.label}

{stat.trend}
))}
{/* Performance & Revenue Section */}
Performance Financière
Revenu Brut
{totalVentes.toLocaleString()} FCFA

Basé sur toutes les ventes validées

Charges totales
{totalDepenses.toLocaleString()} FCFA

Inclut loyer, salaires et frais

Bénéfice Net

Votre profit réel après déduction des dépenses.

= 0 ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-rose-600'}`}> {benefice.toLocaleString()} FCFA
Marge bénéficiaire {totalVentes > 0 ? ((benefice / totalVentes) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0}%
0 ? (benefice / totalVentes) * 100 : 0))}%` }} />
Flux des Ventes
{boutique.commandesClient.map((cmd) => (

{cmd.client ? `${cmd.client.prenom} ${cmd.client.nom}` : "Vente Comptoir"}

{new Date(cmd.createdAt).toLocaleTimeString()} • {cmd.lignes.length} articles

{cmd.total.toLocaleString()} FCFA

{cmd.etat}
))}
{/* Sidebar Status & Critical Info */}
Alertes Stock {boutique.produits.length > 0 ? (
{boutique.produits.map((p) => (
{p.photo ? : }

{p.nom}

{p.quantite}
))}
) : (

Tout est sous contrôle !

)} Dépenses Récentes {boutique.depenses.map((dep) => (

{dep.libelle}

{new Date(dep.date).toLocaleDateString()}

-{dep.montant}
))}

Rapport d'Analyse

Votre activité a progressé de 14% ce mois-ci. Concentrez-vous sur vos clients fidèles pour augmenter votre panier moyen.

); } // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars function CheckCircle2(props: any) { return ( ); }

); } return (

{/* Product Image */}
{item.photo ? ( ) : ( )}
{/* Product Info */}

{item.nom}

{item.boutiqueNom}

{/* Quantity Controls */}
{item.quantite}

))}

))}

); }
